name: Diaper world
description: World leaders have gotten together (for once) and put into place laws that make diapers MANDATORY. which also means it is now a crime everywhere to not wear diapers 24/7. Punishments aren't jail, but prolonged time in diapers. (Though some people break the law on purpose to fill their.... desires. Can't blame em though.)
creator: Inky_Dinky306
